The batter again seemed to be a little late on it. Not many short balls but has already yielded two wickets. Windies in huge trouble.

The ball was swirling and Conway chased it but despite being a little clumsy he managed to take it clean. He almost overran the ball. They are checking did it hit one of the camera wires? Did it deviate a little and that confused the keeper to overrun it? The third umpire had a look but confirmed it is fine. Southee in his comeback game has a wicket here. Pooran was looking to swing hard but has fallen prey to the short ball. I guess he was a little late on it.
